events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario: residential electrical equipment bonding, rough-complete, CSST gas line not bonded. This is fail, high/critical risk? CSST not bonded can be fire/explosion hazard due to lightning puncture. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: CSST gas piping lacks bonding jumper to electrical service grounding electrode system; required by NEC 250.104(B) maybe. Actions: install bonding jumper sized per NEC 250.104(B) (often 6 AWG copper for CSST) connecting CSST to grounding electrode conductor or service equipment ground. References NEC 250.104, 250.30. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70. confidence 1.0. Need include all fields. Ensure valid JSON.

events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",

  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "CSST gas piping is installed but has no bonding jumper to the electrical grounding system",
    "Ungrounded CSST is vulnerable to lightning-induced perforation and gas leak/fire hazard",
    "Missing bond violates NEC 250.104 bonding requirements for gas piping"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved bonding jumper from the CSST gas line to the service equipment ground, grounding electrode conductor, or grounding electrode system",
    "Size the bonding conductor per NEC 250.104(B) requirements (typically not smaller than 6 AWG copper for CSST)",
    "Verify continuity and secure connections; re-inspect before closing up"
  ],
  "rationale": "CSST gas piping must be bonded to the electrical grounding system to prevent damage from lightning or fault currents. The absence of a bond at rough-complete stage is a non-compliant, hazardous defect requiring correction before the work can pass.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
